title: Germany says US troop withdrawal 'foreseeable' as Trump warns of more 'cuts'
description: In the US, two senior Republicans voice concern over President Trump's decision to pull out 5,000 troops.

title: An Insurgency Threatens U.S. Mining Ambitions in Pakistan
description: Attacks by the Baloch Liberation Army could derail Pakistan’s plans for a billion-dollar mining deal with the Trump administration.

title: A Perilous Train Ride Home in Pakistan on the Jaffer Express
description: We witnessed crossfire while waiting for the Jaffer Express, a vital lifeline through Balochistan. For many, it’s the only way home.

title: US approves $8.6bn in arms sales to Middle East allies
description: US State Department cites emergency circumstances to fast-track sales without the approval of Congress.
